artifacts.limitation: Pytest proves rejection but does not emit each error payload or leakage scan.
Existing tests compare golden values but do not export compiled AST and rows per case.
Existing tests do not export resolved predicates, row IDs, and amounts for every case.
Dual-database assertions run, but normalized typed values are not exposed to this collector.
Stable Top N is asserted, but ten raw ordered results are not exported.
SQLite tests pass without exporting the complete normalized golden result set.

No existing harness exports both dialect results for field-by-field comparison.
The current portability context lacks the full same-query editor principal matrix.
RLS behavior is asserted, but intermediate cache and tooltip exclusion are not exported.
Forged South is asserted; no structured proof of the unexpressible RLS-removal case exists.
Cross-workspace tests are distributed and do not export one resource-by-resource result.
403 behavior is asserted separately; atomic no-partial-write state is not exported.
